meaning: n.休耕地adj.[农]休耕的,未孕的,潜伏发,不活跃的vt.使(土地)休闲,休整,潜伏(指潜在的特征等)
examples: Farmers are now paid to let their land lie fallow.
Contemporary dance is coming onto the arts scene again after a long fallow period.
Elsewhere, some growers who have not been able to switch crops are leaving their cornfields fallow.
Like those of every drug company, Glaxo's labs have been relatively fallow for years.
